projectDescription: A Visual Studio Code extension for authoring, visualizing, and validating Arazzo API workflow specifications with live preview, flowchart diagrams, and real-time diagnostics.
keyFeatures: Live documentation preview that refreshes as you type
Real-time validation with inline error diagnostics
Context-aware YAML autocompletion for Arazzo keywords
Outline navigation for workflows, steps, and components
Synchronized views — clicking a step in the flowchart scrolls to it in the preview
Multi-tab support for multiple specification files
VS Code theme integration (Light, Dark, High Contrast)
Zero telemetry — no usage data collected
publicApiSurface: Command: arazzo-vscode.openPreview — Open interactive documentation panel
Command: arazzo-vscode.openFlowchart — Open workflow diagram panel
Arazzo root keys: arazzo, info, sourceDescriptions, workflows, components
Workflow fields: workflowId, summary, description, inputs, dependsOn, steps, outputs, parameters, successActions, failureActions
Step fields: stepId, operationId, operationPath, workflowId, parameters, requestBody, successCriteria, onSuccess, onFailure, outputs
Criterion types: simple, regex, jsonpath, xpath
